title: erigeron incomptus
intro: Erigeron incomptus, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce the risk of infection. The health benefits of Erigeron incomptus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Erigeron incomptus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
